# Ajetix — AI summary for crawlers and AI search

> Ajetix is an international AI, software, and product studio. We design and ship
> SaaS platforms, mobile apps, AI/ML systems, cloud infrastructure, and brand
> experiences for clients in the US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, and the Middle East.

## What we do

- Custom AI & machine learning (LLMs, computer vision, voice, RAG assistants)
- SaaS and enterprise software development
- Mobile apps (React Native, Flutter)
- Cloud & DevOps (Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD)
- UI/UX design systems and WebGL marketing sites

## Key pages

- Home: https://ajetix.com/
- Services: https://ajetix.com/services
- Portfolio: https://ajetix.com/portfolio
- Process: https://ajetix.com/process
- About: https://ajetix.com/about
- Contact: https://ajetix.com/contact

## Contact

- Email: info@ajetix.com
- Website: https://ajetix.com

## AI-assisted development

Ajetix builds production software using modern AI-assisted engineering workflows —
combining human product judgment with tools like LLM copilots, automated testing,
and CI/CD pipelines to ship faster without sacrificing quality.
